open.description: Octotel has informed us of a network outage affecting Stilbaai, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Octotel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content:
Teams continue to work on restoring standby power due to ongoing power issues along Garden Route and are experiencing difficulties with getting the kit operational. We are actively engaging the partner provider for service restoration

We apologize for the delays in restoring services.

open.title: Balwin Outage | The Jade, Greenbay & Paardevlei
open.description: Balwin has informed us of a network outage affecting The Jade, Greenbay & Paardevlei, affected clients will experience no connectivity. Evotel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content: Multiple breaks on fibre backhaul and severe weather has hampered repairs. Balwin teams are actively working on resolving the issue. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience.

open.title: Evotel Outage | Rustenburg
open.description: Evotel has informed us of a network outage affecting Rustenburg, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Evotel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content: The team is currently finalising the cable installation work in the Kloofview area with only two pilot holes remaining. An additional team is also actively tracing the fibre line in 9th Avenue as part of ongoing restoration efforts. Once this work has been completed, connectivity in the Geelhoutpark area is expected to be fully restored. However, in Oos-Einde. our team has identified a faulty splitter in the area which is currently affecting connectivity. The issue is being attended to as part of ongoing repair efforts to restore services as quickly as possible. We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank you for your continued patience and understanding.

Once this work has been completed, connectivity in the Geelhoutpark area is expected to be fully restored. We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank you for your continued patience and understanding.

closed.title: Cybersmart Outage | Cape Town
closed.description: We are investigating reports of no connectivity affecting clients on the Cybersmart network. We are working on identifying and resolve this issue as quickly as possible. We apologize for any inconvenience that this may be causing.

updates.content:
The root cause of the outage has been found and resolved. Client's who are still without service may need to reconfigure the Afrihost fibre router for PPPoE in order to restore connection. A guide to achieve this can be found here: https://help.afrihost.com/entry/how-to-set-up-your-tp-link-ex511-fibre-router-for-a-pppoe-connection
Alternatively please reach out to us on WhatsApp or our call centre for assistance. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience.
